overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through a grassy prairie with pine forests and snow-capped mountains in the background. A horse-drawn carriage overtakes the player character from behind during the latter portion of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through open prairie with mountain vista

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail toward the distant snow-capped mountains

entered.detail: dramatic mountain range with snow-covered peaks forming the backdrop
unpaved dirt path with visible wheel ruts cutting through the grassland
scattered pine trees lining the left side of the trail
dense cluster of pine trees on the right side of the trail
tall green and yellow grass covering the open prairie on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a dirt trail through an expansive grassland prairie. Snow-capped mountains dominate the horizon ahead, while pine forests flank both sides of the path. The scene is bathed in warm afternoon sunlight under a clear blue sky with no other travelers visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through open prairie with mountain vista

events.description: horse-drawn carriage appears in the distance on the left side of the trail, approaching from behind
carriage overtakes the player character, passing closely on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: maintaining a steady walking pace as the carriage approaches and passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage traveling faster than the player, overtaking on the right side of the trail and moving ahead toward the mountains

segments.scene_description: A horse-drawn carriage enters the scene from the left rear and rapidly overtakes the player character, passing within close proximity on the right side of the trail. The carriage, pulled by two horses with a driver, continues forward along the dirt path toward the distant mountains while the player maintains a steady walking pace through the unchanged prairie landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression through a serene prairie landscape that is suddenly interrupted by the passage of a horse-drawn carriage. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail through expansive grasslands, flanked by pine forests under a clear blue sky and warm afternoon sunlight. As the camera maintains its forward momentum toward the snow-capped mountains on the horizon, the quiet atmosphere shifts when a carriage pulled by two horses enters from the left rear. The vehicle rapidly overtakes the character, passing in close proximity on the right side of the path before continuing its journey toward the distant peaks. The scene finally settles back into the rhythmic pace of the walk as the carriage recedes into the unchanging prairie landscape.
